- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the contributing guidelines
- [ ] Tests added / updated (or N/A)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CHANGELOG) (or N/A)
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
